name: Chart Grid
description: Responsive grid of chart containers for data visualization dashboards. Charts use their own title prop — no Card wrapping.

slots.header: Dashboard section title with _heading4 and time-range Select
slots.charts: Array of chart components (Line, Bar, Pie, Area) using the title prop directly

command-center.notes: Chart titles use cc-label. Axis labels use cc-data. Background gets cc-grid. Header uses cc-bar.
